issue_title: fix(web-ui): compact Nursery sessions panel spacing
issue_body_preview:
## Summary
- Tighten spacing in Nursery profile sessions section (nav panel rows, padding, min-heights) for a more compact layout aligned with the chat input area.
- Remove obsolete documentation: \docs/linux-setup.md\ and Feishu bot setup docs (en/zh) under \docs/remote-connect/\.

## Test plan
- [
test_description_zh: 打开 Nursery 页面，查看个人资料的 sessions 面板区域，观察导航面板行间距、内边距和最小高度等布局细节，检查其与聊天输入区域的对齐情况及整体紧凑程度。
expected_result_zh: Nursery sessions 面板的行间距、内边距和最小高度应更加紧凑，面板布局与聊天输入区域对齐良好，无多余空白，整体视觉效果紧凑一致。
